title: About
text:
Bladimir Padilla
    Graduate Student · PSQF · University of Iowa
    
      Welcome! I am a graduate student in Educational Measurement, broadly interested in multilevel and longitudinal analyses, psychometrics, and causal inference. My work sits at the intersection of educational outcomes and quantitative methods, with a particular focus on Chilean higher education.
    
    
      Before graduate school, I studied Social Work at the Universidad del Bio-Bio, Chile, and worked as a research assistant at the Centro de Investigación Educativa CIDCIE in the same university.
      
            
      I am currently working on my transition from graduate student to postdoctoral researcher/professor.
    
  


Main Research Interests

Performance on Standardized Tests · Indicators of Educational Quality · Longitudinal Study Designs · Causal Inference in Observational Studies

News & Updates

News coming soon
